$comment: Example segments.json variant for inputs that carry a Record Descriptor Word (RDW) prefix before every record. Drop the file_a/file_b blocks if a side has no RDW. The engine does not interpret rdw1/rdw2 values; it only consumes total_bytes (= rdw1_bytes + rdw2_bytes) before each TU4R segment.

parser.$comment_rdw: Per-file RDW blocks. Either or both may be omitted; when present, the engine skips rdw1_bytes + rdw2_bytes before each record. encoding is one of 'ascii_int' (zero-padded ASCII decimal) or 'binary_le_uint' (unsigned little-endian integer). Encoding is currently informational only — skip is byte-count-driven.
